purpose: Per-scheme list of WRF savepoints (operator boundaries) each physics lane validates against. The WRF-oracle factory emits these; lanes read them via gpuwrf.validation.phase_b_savepoint.load_phase_b_savepoint. Boundary/operator names must be in PHASE_B_OPERATORS / PHASE_B_BOUNDARIES (or the frozen dycore sets).
ground_truth_source: /home/enric/src/wrf_pristine (pristine WRF v4 em_quarter_ss, gfortran serial) + Gen2 d02 wrfout for operational RMSE

savepoints.captures: full pre-microphysics column: theta/T, p, rho, qv, qc, qr, qi, qs, qg, Ni, Nr
internal process cuts: condensation/evaporation, ice nucleation, riming, melting, sedimentation flux — each process delta on q* and N*
savepoints.note: one savepoint per internal process boundary the factory can cut; lane validates the cumulative q*/N*/theta after each

savepoints.captures: post-microphysics theta (latent heat), qv, qc, qr, qi, qs, qg, Ni, Nr, precip accumulators rain/snow/graupel/ice

B1_thompson_microphysics.inactive_physical_rule: zero output is correct (INACTIVE_PHYSICAL) where pre-state condensate < 1e-8 kg/kg AND qv < 1e-6 kg/kg

savepoints.captures: u/v mass-point, theta, qv, p, dz, t_skin, soil_moisture, xland, lakemask, mavail, roughness_m, ustar
ustar, theta_flux (HFX kinematic), qv_flux (LH kinematic), tau_u, tau_v, rhosfc, fltv; operational T2/U10/V10
MYNN Level-2 stability functions / fluxes (module_bl_mynn.F mym_level2)
MYNN tendencies on u, v, theta, qv, qke applied to the column (mynn_tendencies)
post-PBL u, v, w, theta, qv, qke; operational PBLH

B2_surface_and_pbl.inactive_physical_rule: zero surface flux is correct (INACTIVE_PHYSICAL) where near-surface wind speed < 1e-3 m/s; zero MYNN mixing is correct where TKE < 1e-6 m2/s2 and surface fluxes are zero

savepoints.captures: theta/T, p, rho, dz, qv, qc, qi, qs, qg, cloud fraction, t_skin, lu_index, coszen (lat/lon + model time)
SW heating-rate profile, SWDOWN, SWUP at surface; albedo, coszen
LW heating-rate profile, GLW (down) and GLW_up at surface; emissivity
post-radiation theta after combined SW+LW heating tendency applied

B3_radiation_and_land.inactive_physical_rule: zero SW heating is correct (INACTIVE_PHYSICAL) where coszen <= 1e-3 (sun below horizon, nighttime column); LW always active when the operator fires

notes.factory_caveat: M9 divergence_map.json records that per-operator WRF Fortran trace requires WRF recompilation; the pristine WRF build at /home/enric/src/wrf_pristine is the arbiter for operator-boundary savepoints, while Gen2 d02 wrfout supplies the operational hour-by-hour RMSE comparison.
notes.B4_excluded: B4 (static fields + lateral boundaries) validates against wrfinput/wrfbdy data-replay (bitwise for prescribed static fields per divergence_map.json), not against per-operator physics savepoints; it therefore has no scheme entry here.
